S: Single-container 3D bin packing with strict physical feasibility. The solver must place all rectangular boxes into one fixed-size container while obeying conservative real-world static stability rules.

K.name: Boundary
K.description: Every box must lie fully inside the container bounds.

K.name: Non-overlap
K.description: No two axis-aligned boxes may overlap in 3D space.

K.name: Completeness
K.description: Every input item must be placed exactly once.

K.name: AxisAligned
K.description: Boxes are placed without rotation; use the given l, w, h as-is.

K.name: StrictSupport
K.description: Any box with z > 0 must have its entire bottom footprint supported by coplanar top faces directly beneath it.

K.name: NoFloating
K.description: Floating, hanging, bridging, or partially supported placements are invalid.

K.name: FragileNotLoadBearing
K.description: Fragile boxes may not directly support another box.

Y: A complete placement list of dicts with keys id, x, y, z; each entry gives the lower-left-bottom coordinate of one placed box.
Z: Primary objective: find a complete physically feasible packing. Secondary objective: prefer compact layouts with lower used height and smaller occupied bounding volume.
